name: Hecahands Yadel
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>見えざる手</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ヘカトンケイル</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ヤドエル
desc: If this card battles a monster, neither can be destroyed by that battle. You can only use each of the following effects of "Hecahands Yadel" once per turn. You can reveal this card in your hand; shuffle this card into the Deck, then add 1 "Hecahands" Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand. If this card is sent to the GY: You can target 1 "Hecahands" Spell/Trap in your GY; Set it.
mnst_eff: If this card battles a monster, neither can be destroyed by that battle. You can only use each of the following effects of "Hecahands Yadel" once per turn. You can reveal this card in your hand; shuffle this card into the Deck, then add 1 "Hecahands" Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand. If this card is sent to the GY: You can target 1 "Hecahands" Spell/Trap in your GY; Set it.
eff: If this card battles a monster, neither can be destroyed by that battle. You can only use each of the following effects of "Hecahands Yadel" once per turn. You can reveal this card in your hand; shuffle this card into the Deck, then add 1 "Hecahands" Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand. If this card is sent to the GY: You can target 1 "Hecahands" Spell/Trap in your GY; Set it.

action: Returns itself from hand to Deck
Activates if sent to the Graveyard
